Bidder offers and agrees if this response is accepted within 45 calendar days following the date the response is due to furnish all the items upon which prices are quoted, at the prices set
opposite each item, delivered at the designated point(s) by the method of delivery and within the times specified and subject to the attached General Provisions. DECLARATIONS UNDER
PENALTY OF PERJURY; By signing above, with inclusion of the date of signature, the above signed bidder DECLARES UNDER PENALTY OF PERJURY under the laws of the State of
California as follows: (1) (STATEMENT OF COMPLIANCE). The above signed as complied with the non-discrimination program requirements of Government Code 12990 and Title 2,
California Administrative Code Section 8103, and such declaration is true and correct. (2) The National Labor Relations Board declaration set forth in Paragraph 48 of the General
Provisions is true and correct. (3) If a claim is made for the Small Business or Disabled Veterans Business preference, the information set forth within is true and correct.
DESCRIPTION
The purpose of this Request for Quote for Information Technology (RFQ) Services is to provide a Vote by Mail (VBM)
Ballot Tracking System (BTS) Managed Software-as-a-Service (MSaaS), related services, resources, and tools for the 58
counties in the State of California on a monthly subscription fee basis.
The following are incorporated as part of this Request for Quote for IT Services:
1. Requirements, including quote details and cost proposal and all attachments.
2. State’s Standard Agreement (STD 213); see Section I General Information, Sub-section G.22 of this RFQ.
3. Bidder Instructions DGS PD 451 Rev. 11/9/2011) can be located at: https://www.dgs.ca.gov/PD/Search-
Results?search=Bidders%20Instructions&divisionid=7bce8ca3ed8a4aedbdeaf52f5e77df36&activeFilters=division-or-
office-facets; the General Provisions – Cloud – Computing Services DGS PD 402-ITGP (Cloud) (Revised and Effective
2/20/2025) can be located at:
https://www.dgs.ca.gov/PD/Search-
Results?search=General%20Provisions&divisionid=7bce8ca3ed8a4aedbdeaf52f5e77df36&activeFilters=division-or-
